stemHtml:
Three aircraft arrive over the scene of a recent aircraft accident at ten-minute intervals:

(1) cannot establish contact with the Search and Rescue Centre
(2) can contact the Search and Rescue Centre
(3) is a Search and Rescue helicopter

How does command of the situation pass between them?

options.a: (1) first, then by mutual consent to (2), then to (3).
options.b: (2) first, then by mutual consent to (3) until operations are complete.
options.c: (1) first, then by mutual consent directly to (3).
